testcase.name: test_system_info
test_websocket_connects

failure.message: Failed: WebSocket connection failed: 'ClientConnection' object has no attribute 'open'

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_websocket_p1.py:129: in test_websocket_connects assert ws.open ^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'ClientConnection' object has no attribute 'open'
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_websocket_p1.py:132: in test_websocket_connects pytest.fail(f"WebSocket connection failed: {e}") E Failed: WebSocket connection failed: 'ClientConnection' object has no attribute 'open'

testcase.name: test_websocket_stays_open

failure.message: Failed: WebSocket connection dropped: 'ClientConnection' object has no attribute 'open'

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_websocket_p1.py:140: in test_websocket_stays_open assert ws.open ^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'ClientConnection' object has no attribute 'open'
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_websocket_p1.py:143: in test_websocket_stays_open pytest.fail(f"WebSocket connection dropped: {e}") E Failed: WebSocket connection dropped: 'ClientConnection' object has no attribute 'open'
